node_1_locus.question: How did you relate to your work environment today?

options.text: I acted as the Craftsman; I intentionally structured my time and drove the outcome.
I acted as the Apprentice; I responded to the urgent demands handed to me.

node_2_mindset_internal.question: Since you were directing your work, what was your primary aim?

options.text: To execute tasks with precision and validate my current level of mastery.
To experiment with my technique and discover where I can push my skills further.

node_2_mindset_external.question: Since you were responding to demands, how did you handle the friction?

options.text: I focused on getting tasks done flawlessly to meet expectations.

variable_state.mindset: meeting expectations and surviving the workload

options.text: I observed the workflow to figure out how to navigate these demands better next time.

variable_state.mindset: learning from the workflow for the future

node_3_radius.question: Where does your satisfaction naturally stem from today?

options.text: Ensuring my own workspace is organized and my personal tasks are complete.
Seeing how my contribution helped the entire shop run smoother for the team.

variable_state.radius: the collective momentum of the team

final_reflection.template: Today, you operated as {locus}, focusing on {mindset}, with your concern being {radius}.
